rationale: The proposed change concerns the Tax Code residence homestead exemption amount. Educ. Code §38.351 governs school mental health and suicide prevention programs. The two provisions address unrelated subjects and share no operative dependency.
quote: Sec. 38.351. MENTAL HEALTH PROMOTION AND INTERVENTION, SUBSTANCE ABUSE PREVENTION AND INTERVENTION, AND SUICIDE PREVENTION.
_note: No conflict; proposed Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption increase is unrelated to Educ. Code §38.351.
